goal: Raise main.py coverage toward 90% with release-only tests
notes: All new coverage tests should be marked @pytest.mark.release
verify excludes release tests; verify-release runs all tests

tickets.title: Cover replay state helpers
tickets.description: Add release-marked tests for _init_replay_state defaults, _append_applied_event_id trimming, and _select_target_session_id preference behavior.

tickets.title: Cover apply_event_to_state branches
tickets.description: Add release-marked tests covering task.start/update/end, commit.start/end, error, tool.result(ok false) branches.

tickets.title: Cover tests_suggest path logic
tickets.description: Add release-marked tests for _test_candidates_for_path and tests_suggest outputs for src/ paths, tests paths, and non-code files.

tickets.title: Cover roll_forward_replay sequencing edges
tickets.description: Add release-marked tests for start_seq inference from checkpoint/snapshot and end_seq filtering behavior.

tickets.title: Cover tools_call error paths
tickets.description: Add release-marked tests for unknown tool names and alias mapping resolution with minimal stub arguments.

tickets.title: Cover journal rotation helpers
tickets.description: Add release-marked tests that exercise _parse_iso_ts and _rotate_journal_if_prev_week with controlled timestamps via temporary journal files.

tickets.title: Raise release coverage toward 90%
tickets.description: Add release-marked tests for init.py entrypoints and remaining main.py tool/verify flows to lift overall coverage.

tickets.title: Cover remaining main.py execution paths
tickets.description: Add release-marked tests for untested main.py branches (tool/verify/commit flows and error handling) to continue raising overall coverage.

tickets.title: Expand main.py tool handler coverage
tickets.description: Add release-marked tests for handle_request initialize/tools/call responses, tools_list schema details, and git/verify failure branches to continue raising coverage toward 90%.

tickets.title: Cover journal and snapshot utilities
tickets.description: Add release-marked tests for journal/snapshot/checkpoint helpers and remaining edge cases to continue raising overall coverage toward 90%.

tickets.title: Cover remaining helper edge cases
tickets.description: Add release-marked tests for remaining helpers and error paths to push coverage closer to 90%.

tickets.title: Increase coverage toward 90% with integration paths
tickets.description: Add release-marked tests for remaining high-value branches (tool flows, error paths, and IO helpers) to continue raising coverage toward 90%.

tickets.title: Expand coverage on remaining branches
tickets.description: Add release-marked tests targeting remaining uncovered branches to move coverage toward 90%.
